data.title: Laura Geller Beauty's new line boosts confidence by smoothing fine lines fast, launched with help from reality star Dolores Catania.

This development showcases Laura Geller Beauty's commitment to addressing the needs of mature individuals.

data.title: Research report predicts growth in medium & large calibre military ammo market due to war in Ukraine and need for increased production by 2033.
data.description: A report titled "Medium & Large Calibre Military Ammunition - Market and Technology Forecast to 2033" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The global ammunition market is significantly influenced by the ongoing war in Ukraine and the need for escalated production. The conflict has led to a sharp increase in ammunition usage, indicating a lack of preparation among Western nations for intense combat against equal adversaries. Specifically, the report highlights the impact on European countries.

data.title: Singerman Real Estate buys TractorWorks Building in Minneapolis, MN - 350,000 sq ft office building & 640-stall parking ramp - partnering with City Center Realty Partners.
data.description: Singerman Real Estate, managed fund has recently purchased the TractorWorks Building and its attached 640-stall parking ramp in Minneapolis, MN's North Loop. The brick and timber creative office building spans 350,000 square feet. The strategic acquisition aims to leverage the potential of the dynamic neighborhood. City Center Realty Partners will collaborate with SRE in managing the property. With significant experience in Minneapolis, City Center will assume the role of property manager for the building.

data.title: Tint World named a top franchise, securing #1 category ranking and jumping 24 spots to #500 in Entrepreneur's Franchise 500.
data.description: A prominent automotive styling franchise has attained the top rank in its category and has surged by 24 positions in its overall ranking compared to last year. Tint World® Automotive Styling Centers™, headquartered in Boca Raton, Florida, received this distinction in the latest report released on January 13, 2026. The franchise now stands among the top 500 franchises according to Entrepreneur's rankings.

data.title: SkyView Atlanta closes for maintenance after suspected lightning strike, to reopen Feb 12, 2026.
data.description: In Atlanta, the renowned observation wheel, SkyView Atlanta, situated in the city center, will be closed temporarily for maintenance and repairs starting January 13, 2026. This decision comes after a thorough evaluation where SkyView Atlanta determined the need for comprehensive maintenance. The closure aims to address any outstanding issues and ensure the safety and optimal functionality of the wheel. The duration of this closure is yet to be disclosed.

data.title: Enverus's 2026 Global Energy Outlook discusses commodity price pressure, strain on power systems, and oil market shifts, with a focus on changing U.S. load expectations and Venezuela's long-term oil supply potential. Selective investments across the energy transition are highlighted.
data.description: Enverus, a prominent energy SaaS and analytics platform, is set to release its annual analysis on Jan. 13, 2026, highlighting fluctuations in U.S. load expectations. The report also sheds light on the growing long-term oil supply potential in Venezuela. Moreover, Enverus will discuss strategic investments made across the energy transition landscape. Stay tuned for insights into these developments.
